chunks.text: Somayeh Sojoudi is an Associate Professor in the Departments of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences and Mechanical Engineering at UC Berkeley. She is a Senior Associate Editor of IEEE Systems Journal. She has served as Associate Editor for the journals of IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid, Systems & Control Letters, IEEE Open Journal of Control Systems, and IEEE Access. She has also been a member of the conference editorial board of the IEEE Control Systems Society.
chunks.question: What is Somayeh Sojoudi's academic position and editorial roles?
chunks.answer: Associate Professor and IEEE journal editor.

chunks.text: She has served as a senior program committee member for AAAI and as an Area Chair for NeurIPS, ICML, and ICLR. She received several awards and honors, including NSF CAREER Award, ONR Young Investigator Award, INFORMS Optimization Society Prize for Young Researchers, INFORMS Energy Best Publication Award, INFORMS Data Mining Best Paper Award, and Best-of-the-Best conference paper award of IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting.
chunks.question: What conference roles and major awards has Sojoudi received?
chunks.answer: AI conference chair and multiple prestigious awards.

chunks.text: Education: 2013, PhD, Control & Dynamical Systems, California Institute of Technology. Research Areas: Artificial Intelligence (AI), Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR), Power and Energy (ENE), Optimization Theory (Non-Convex Optimization; Low-rank Optimization; Conic Optimization). Numerical Algorithms.
chunks.question: What are Sojoudi's education and research focus areas?
chunks.answer: PhD from Caltech in control and optimization.

chunks.text: Selected Honors and Awards: Institute of Electrical & Electronics Engineers (IEEE) Fellow (2026), IEEE PES Best-of-the-Best Conference Paper Award (2022), Office of Naval Research Young Investigator (2021), NSF Faculty Early Career Development Award (CAREER) (2021), INFORMS Data Mining (DM) Best Paper Award (2018), INFORMS Energy, Natural Resources, and the Environment (ENRE) Best Publication Award in Energy (2016), INFORMS Optimization Society Young Researchers Prize (2015).
chunks.question: What are some key honors and awards received by Sojoudi?
chunks.answer: IEEE Fellow and multiple INFORMS awards.
